title: Dials Decide the Battle
description: The conflict over Upper Yard gains historical weight as the land’s importance to the Shandia becomes clearer.
scene: Across pages 8, 9, 10, 11, this scene centers on Enel, Wyper, Shandia warrior, Gan Fall, Luffy. The conflict over Upper Yard gains historical weight as the land’s importance to the Shandia becomes clearer.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You deserved it, you bad- mannered idiot!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Shut up! It's none of your business!

dialogue.speaker: Shandia warrior
dialogue.text: It is my business... this island...

dialogue.speaker: Shandia warrior
dialogue.text: belongs to us, the people of Shanghai!!

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: I thought this was God's place...

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: You shouldn't have pissed me off!!!

summary: The conflict over Upper Yard gains historical weight as the land’s importance to the Shandia becomes clearer.
